REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (167 Caine Ave. San Francisco, Ca 94122)
Off Calendar Sep-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Herb Thomas (Petitioner).

The sale was confirmed at $440,000.00. The sale will be on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $84,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 289209 Conservatorship of Ella Dee Simpson.

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for and with Herb Thomas.

Mr. Schultz explained the extent of services provided by the Conservator/Trustee to support their fee request, the difficulty in dealing with the Conservatee, explained that Mr. Thomas has other Parties who assist him and stated that Mr. Thomas was willing to reduce the fee request with regard to the amount of the insufficient funds fees. The matters were taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
